description: Risk envelope thresholds for vault deposit gating

apy_z_max.description: Max APY z-score (current vs 30d median). Exceeding this indicates an APY anomaly.

deny_on_allocation_change.description: Whether to deny if vault allocation/strategy metadata has changed since last evaluation

deny_on_critical_flag.description: Whether to deny if the vault has a flag with severity 'critical' or 'high'

deny_on_corrupted.description: Whether to deny if the vault is reported as corrupted by the data source
